//NotifierTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Stub de notification : journalise un avertissement reprenant le run et le nb d'anomalies.</summary>
public sealed class NotifierTests
{
    private static readonly DateTimeOffset Now = new(2026, 6, 15, 22, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero);

    [Fact]
    public async Task NotifyAsync_Logs_Warning_With_Run_Details()
    {
        // Arrange
        var logger = new RecordingLogger<Notifier>();
        var run = VerificationRun.Start(Guid.NewGuid(), new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15), Now);
        run.Complete(Now.AddMinutes(2), cbpCount: 10, fxCount: 12, anomalyCount: 3);

        // Act
        await new Notifier(logger).NotifyAsync(run, CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        var entry = Assert.Single(logger.Entries);
        Assert.Equal(LogLevel.Warning, entry.Level);
        Assert.Contains(run.Id.ToString(), entry.Message);
        Assert.Contains("3 anomalie", entry.Message);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task NotifyAsync_Null_Run_Throws()
    {
        var notifier = new Notifier(new RecordingLogger<Notifier>());

        await Assert.ThrowsAsync<ArgumentNullException>(() => notifier.NotifyAsync(null!, CancellationToken.None));
    }
}

//end NotifierTests

//CbpBearerTokenHandlerTests
using System.Net;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;
using NSubstitute;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Le handler injecte le bearer token (fourni par ICbpTokenProvider) dans l'en-tête Authorization.</summary>
public sealed class CbpBearerTokenHandlerTests
{
    [Fact]
    public async Task SendAsync_Adds_Bearer_Authorization_Header()
    {
        // Arrange — provider renvoie un token, handler interne capture la requête sortante.
        var tokenProvider = Substitute.For<ICbpTokenProvider>();
        tokenProvider.GetTokenAsync(Arg.Any<CancellationToken>()).Returns("tok-123");

        HttpRequestMessage? sent = null;
        var inner = new RoutingHttpMessageHandler(req =>
        {
            sent = req;
            return new HttpResponseMessage(HttpStatusCode.OK);
        });
        var handler = new CbpBearerTokenHandler(tokenProvider, NullLogger<CbpBearerTokenHandler>.Instance) { InnerHandler = inner };
        using var invoker = new HttpMessageInvoker(handler);

        // Act
        using var response = await invoker.SendAsync(
            new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Get, "https://cbp.test/api/transactions"), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(HttpStatusCode.OK, response.StatusCode);
        Assert.NotNull(sent!.Headers.Authorization);
        Assert.Equal("Bearer", sent.Headers.Authorization!.Scheme);
        Assert.Equal("tok-123", sent.Headers.Authorization.Parameter);
        await tokenProvider.Received(1).GetTokenAsync(Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }
}

//end CbpBearerTokenHandlerTests

//CbpTradeActionExtensionsTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.SharedKernel;

/// <summary>Parsing « B/S/BS/SB » et résolution du sens effectif par jambe (near/far).</summary>
public sealed class CbpTradeActionExtensionsTests
{
    [Theory]
    [InlineData("B", CbpTradeAction.Buy)]
    [InlineData("S", CbpTradeAction.Sell)]
    [InlineData("BS", CbpTradeAction.BuySell)]
    [InlineData("SB", CbpTradeAction.SellBuy)]
    [InlineData(" bs ", CbpTradeAction.BuySell)]   // trim + insensible à la casse
    public void Parse_Maps_Known_Values(string raw, CbpTradeAction expected)
    {
        Assert.Equal(expected, CbpTradeActionExtensions.Parse(raw));
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData(null)]
    [InlineData("")]
    [InlineData("X")]
    public void Parse_Throws_On_Unknown(string? raw)
    {
        Assert.Throws<ArgumentException>(() => CbpTradeActionExtensions.Parse(raw));
    }

    [Theory]
    // Achat/vente simples : le sens est le même sur les deux jambes.
    [InlineData(CbpTradeAction.Buy, false, LegSide.Buy)]
    [InlineData(CbpTradeAction.Buy, true, LegSide.Buy)]
    [InlineData(CbpTradeAction.Sell, false, LegSide.Sell)]
    [InlineData(CbpTradeAction.Sell, true, LegSide.Sell)]
    // Swaps : near et far ont des sens inverses.
    [InlineData(CbpTradeAction.BuySell, false, LegSide.Buy)]
    [InlineData(CbpTradeAction.BuySell, true, LegSide.Sell)]
    [InlineData(CbpTradeAction.SellBuy, false, LegSide.Sell)]
    [InlineData(CbpTradeAction.SellBuy, true, LegSide.Buy)]
    public void LegSide_Resolves_Effective_Side(CbpTradeAction action, bool isFarLeg, LegSide expected)
    {
        Assert.Equal(expected, action.LegSide(isFarLeg));
    }
}

//end CbpTradeActionExtensionsTests

//FxTresorerieDbConnectionFactoryTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Common.Persistence;

/// <summary>Fabrique de connexion : lit ConnectionStrings:Default et crée une SqlConnection par appel.</summary>
public sealed class FxTresorerieDbConnectionFactoryTests
{
    private static IConfiguration ConfigWith(string? defaultConnectionString)
    {
        var data = new Dictionary<string, string?>();
        if (defaultConnectionString is not null)
        {
            data["ConnectionStrings:Default"] = defaultConnectionString;
        }

        return new ConfigurationBuilder().AddInMemoryCollection(data).Build();
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Create_Returns_A_New_SqlConnection_Per_Call()
    {
        var factory = new FxTresorerieDbConnectionFactory(
            ConfigWith("Server=(local);Database=Db;Trusted_Connection=True;TrustServerCertificate=True"));

        using var first = factory.Create();
        using var second = factory.Create();

        Assert.NotNull(first);
        Assert.NotSame(first, second);   // une nouvelle connexion à chaque appel
        Assert.Equal("Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection", first.GetType().FullName);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Constructor_Throws_When_Default_Connection_String_Missing()
    {
        Assert.Throws<InvalidOperationException>(() => new FxTresorerieDbConnectionFactory(ConfigWith(null)));
    }
}

//end FxTresorerieDbConnectionFactoryTests

//SystemClockTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Time;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.SharedKernel;

/// <summary>Horloge système : instant courant en UTC (offset zéro).</summary>
public sealed class SystemClockTests
{
    [Fact]
    public void Current_Returns_Utc_Now()
    {
        var clock = new SystemClock();

        var before = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow;
        var current = clock.Current;
        var after = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow;

        Assert.Equal(TimeSpan.Zero, current.Offset);   // UTC
        Assert.InRange(current, before, after);
    }
}

//end SystemClockTests

//RecordingLogger
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;

/// <summary>ILogger de test : capture chaque entrée (niveau + message formaté) pour assertion.</summary>
public sealed class RecordingLogger<T> : ILogger<T>
{
    public List<(LogLevel Level, string Message)> Entries { get; } = [];

    public IDisposable? BeginScope<TState>(TState state) where TState : notnull => null;

    public bool IsEnabled(LogLevel logLevel) => true;

    public void Log<TState>(LogLevel logLevel, EventId eventId, TState state, Exception? exception, Func<TState, Exception?, string> formatter)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(formatter);
        Entries.Add((logLevel, formatter(state, exception)));
    }
}

//end RecordingLogger

// FxSentryTransactionSource
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;
using Dapper;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using Microsoft.Data.SqlClient;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Options de la source FXSentry (section « FxSentry » de appsettings). La chaîne
/// de connexion (base unique) vit dans ConnectionStrings:Default.</summary>
public sealed class FxSentryOptions
{
    public const string SectionName = "FxSentry";

    /// <summary>Schéma de la vue exposant les transactions FXSentry (nos objets : schéma integrite).</summary>
    public string ViewSchema { get; set; } = "integrite";

    /// <summary>
    /// Vue (maintenue par les DBA) appliquant jointures/filtres et résolvant le cross (sCcyCross) — cf. db/README.md.
    /// </summary>
    public string ViewName { get; set; } = "CBP_V_INTEGRITE_F_FRONTOFFICE";
}

/// <summary>Ligne brute de la vue FXSentry (matérialisée par Dapper). Dates en INT yyyyMMdd.</summary>
public sealed class FxSentryRow
{
    public string CustRef { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string TradeNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public int ActiveTradeStatus { get; set; }
    public string CrossBaseCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string CrossCurrencyCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public bool CrossFlipped { get; set; }
    public string BuyCurrency { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string SellCurrency { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string SetCurrency { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string? UserId { get; set; }
    public string CustomerCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public int OriginalMaster { get; set; }
    public string? Remark { get; set; }
    public decimal FxRate { get; set; }
    public decimal FxSpread { get; set; }
    public int ValueDate { get; set; }
    public int TradeDate { get; set; }
    public decimal BuyAmount { get; set; }
    public decimal SellAmount { get; set; }
}

/// <summary>
/// Adapter FXSentry (ResultSet B) : lit la vue (Dapper) filtrée sur la plage de TRADE_DATE.
/// Toute indisponibilité SQL est traduite en <see cref="TransactionSourceUnavailableException"/>.
/// </summary>
public sealed class FxSentryTransactionSource(
    IAppDbConnectionFactory connectionFactory,
    IOptions<FxSentryOptions> options,
    ILogger<FxSentryTransactionSource> logger) : IFxSentryTransactionSource
{
    // Nom de la vue = identifiant SQL (NON paramétrable) : validé contre une liste blanche puis
    // encadré en crochets, une seule fois. Issu de la config (FxSentry:ViewSchema/ViewName), pas
    // d'une entrée utilisateur, mais on durcit pour écarter toute injection via une config altérée.
    private readonly string _qualifiedViewName = BuildQualifiedViewName(options.Value);

    [SuppressMessage(
        "Security Hotspot", "S2077:Formatting SQL queries is security-sensitive",
        Justification =
            "Le seul élément interpolé non constant est le nom de vue, validé contre une liste blanche " +
            "d'identifiants puis encadré en crochets (cf. QuoteIdentifier) — un nom d'objet SQL n'étant pas " +
            "paramétrable. Les valeurs (plage de dates) passent par des paramètres Dapper " +
            "(@FromTradeDate/@ToTradeDate) et les alias de colonnes sont des constantes nameof.")]
    public async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction>> GetTransactionsAsync(VerificationDateRange range, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(range);

        var fromTradeDate = ToYyyymmdd(range.FromTradeDate);
        var toTradeDate = ToYyyymmdd(range.ToTradeDate);

        // SQL « dynamique » mais sûr : (1) les alias de colonnes sont des constantes nameof ;
        // (2) le nom de vue est validé + encadré (cf. _qualifiedViewName) car non paramétrable ;
        // (3) la plage de dates passe par des paramètres Dapper (@FromTradeDate / @ToTradeDate).
        var sql = $"""
            SELECT CUST_REF AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.CustRef)},
                   TRADE_NUMBER AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.TradeNumber)},
                   ACTIVE_TRADE_STATUS AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.ActiveTradeStatus)},
                   CROSS_BASE_CODE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.CrossBaseCode)},
                   CROSS_CURRENCY_CODE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.CrossCurrencyCode)},
                   CROSS_FLIPPED AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.CrossFlipped)},
                   BUY_CURRENCY AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.BuyCurrency)},
                   SELL_CURRENCY AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.SellCurrency)},
                   SET_CURRENCY AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.SetCurrency)},
                   USER_ID AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.UserId)},
                   CUSTOMER_CODE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.CustomerCode)},
                   ORIGINAL_MASTER AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.OriginalMaster)},
                   REMARK AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.Remark)},
                   FX_RATE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.FxRate)},
                   FX_SPREAD AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.FxSpread)},
                   VALUE_DATE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.ValueDate)},
                   TRADE_DATE AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.TradeDate)},
                   BUY_AMOUNT AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.BuyAmount)},
                   SELL_AMOUNT AS {nameof(FxSentryRow.SellAmount)}
            FROM {_qualifiedViewName}
            WHERE TRADE_DATE BETWEEN @FromTradeDate AND @ToTradeDate;
            """;

        try
        {
            logger.LogDebug("Lecture de la vue FXSentry [{From}..{To}].", fromTradeDate, toTradeDate);

            using var connection = connectionFactory.Create();
            var rows = await connection.QueryAsync<FxSentryRow>(
                new CommandDefinition(sql, new { FromTradeDate = fromTradeDate, ToTradeDate = toTradeDate }, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));

            return rows.Select(Map).ToArray();
        }
        catch (SqlException ex)
        {
            throw new TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource.FxSentry, "Base FXSentry inaccessible.", ex);
        }
    }

    /// <summary>Projette une ligne de vue vers le modèle de domaine (conversion des dates INT).</summary>
    public static FxSentryTransaction Map(FxSentryRow row)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(row);
        return new FxSentryTransaction
        {
            CustRef = row.CustRef,
            TradeNumber = row.TradeNumber,
            ActiveTradeStatus = row.ActiveTradeStatus,
            CrossBaseCode = row.CrossBaseCode,
            CrossCurrencyCode = row.CrossCurrencyCode,
            CrossFlipped = row.CrossFlipped,
            BuyCurrency = row.BuyCurrency,
            SellCurrency = row.SellCurrency,
            SetCurrency = row.SetCurrency,
            UserId = row.UserId,
            CustomerCode = row.CustomerCode,
            OriginalMaster = row.OriginalMaster,
            Remark = row.Remark,
            FxRate = row.FxRate,
            FxSpread = row.FxSpread,
            ValueDate = FromYyyymmdd(row.ValueDate),
            TradeDate = FromYyyymmdd(row.TradeDate),
            BuyAmount = row.BuyAmount,
            SellAmount = row.SellAmount,
        };
    }

    private static int ToYyyymmdd(DateOnly date) => (date.Year * 10000) + (date.Month * 100) + date.Day;

    public static DateOnly FromYyyymmdd(int value) => new(value / 10000, value / 100 % 100, value % 100);

    /// <summary>
    /// Construit le nom qualifié <c>[schema].[vue]</c> à partir de la config, en VALIDANT chaque
    /// identifiant (liste blanche) puis en l'encadrant de crochets. Un nom d'objet SQL ne pouvant
    /// pas être paramétré, cette validation écarte toute injection même via une config altérée.
    /// </summary>
    private static string BuildQualifiedViewName(FxSentryOptions options) =>
        $"{QuoteIdentifier(options.ViewSchema)}.{QuoteIdentifier(options.ViewName)}";

    /// <summary>Valide un identifiant SQL (lettre/_ puis lettres/chiffres/_) et l'encadre de crochets.</summary>
    private static string QuoteIdentifier(string identifier)
    {
        bool valid = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(identifier)
                     && (char.IsAsciiLetter(identifier[0]) || identifier[0] == '_')
                     && identifier.All(c => char.IsAsciiLetterOrDigit(c) || c == '_');
        if (!valid)
        {
            throw new InvalidOperationException(
                $"Identifiant SQL FxSentry invalide : « {identifier} » (attendu : lettres ASCII, chiffres ou « _ », commençant par une lettre ou « _ »).");
        }

        return $"[{identifier}]";
    }
}

//end FxSentryTransactionSource

//

//end
